⊢ Submodule.span R
      (Set.range
        ⇑({ toFun := List.get RootPairing.EmbeddedG2.allCoeffs, inj' := ⋯ }.trans

proof:
refine eq_top_iff.mpr fun x _ ↦ ?_
    obtain ⟨a, b, rfl⟩ : ∃ a b, x = ![a, b] := by exact ⟨x 0, x 1, by ext i; fin_cases i <;> rfl⟩
    refine mem_span_insert.mpr ⟨a, b • (Int.cast ∘ ![1, 0]), mem_span_singleton.mpr ⟨b, rfl⟩, ?_⟩
    simp
